# Drivelectric

Drivelectric is an electric mobility and EV infrastructure company based in Kenya, focused on accelerating the transition to sustainable transportation in Africa.

We design and deploy:
- EV charging infrastructure
- Fleet electrification solutions
- Electric vehicle adoption systems
- Energy management solutions
- Mobility consulting for organizations and governments

Website: https://drivelectric.ke

## Key Pages
- Home: https://drivelectric.ke/
- About: https://drivelectric.ke/about
- Solutions: https://drivelectric.ke/solutions
- Vehicles: https://drivelectric.ke/vehicles
- Financing: https://drivelectric.ke/financing
- Projects: https://drivelectric.ke/projects
- Blog: https://drivelectric.ke/blog

## Priority Content
High priority pages for understanding the business:
1. Solutions (EV charging + fleet electrification)
2. Projects (real-world deployments and case studies)
3. Financing (adoption support for EV transition)

## Target Market
- Fleet operators
- Governments
- Energy companies
- Corporates transitioning to EVs
- Mobility innovators in Africa

## Geographic Focus
Kenya and East Africa, expanding across Africa.

## Notes
Drivelectric focuses on real-world deployment of electric mobility infrastructure and practical solutions for decarbonizing transport systems.
